scripts.db:migrate:server: bun run --filter='@aikirun/server' build && aiki migrate apply --package server --env-file ./.env
scripts.db:migrate:iam: bun run --filter='@aikirun/iam' build && aiki migrate apply --package iam --env-file ./.env
scripts.db:migrate: bun run db:migrate:server && bun run db:migrate:iam
